---
title: "Quill Editor Test"
format: revealjs
revealjs-plugins:
  - editable
---

## Basic Text Editing

::: {.editable}
Click the edit button to test basic text editing. Type here and verify changes are saved.
:::

## Formatting Tests

::: {.editable}
Test **bold**, *italic*, [underline]{.underline}, and ~~strikethrough~~ formatting.
:::

## Color Tests

::: {.editable}
Test text color and background color. Apply colors and verify they save correctly.
:::

## Alignment Tests

::: {.editable}
Test left, center, and right alignment using the toolbar buttons.
:::

## Multiple Elements

::: {.editable}
First editable element on this slide.
:::

::: {.editable}
Second editable element on this slide.
:::
